name: Fajita Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a hot fire in a grill. In a large skillet, heat olive oil. Add onion and bell pepper and cook over medium heat, stirring often, until vegetables are lightly browned, about 4 minutes. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the cooked vegetables, ground chicken, lime juice, chili powder, and salt. Using wet hands, form into 4 ovals, approximately 2-inch wide and 4-1/2 inches long.
3. Place patties in the center of the oiled grill, set about 4-6 inches from coals. Cook, turning once, until browned, about 4 minutes. Transfer burgers to the outside edge of the grill and continue grilling, turning once, until burgers are cooked through and meat springs back when pressed lightly with a finger, 8-10 minutes. Meanwhile, wrap tortillas in aluminum foil and place on sides of grill to heat through.
4. Place warm tortillas and bowls of salsa and guacamole on the table. Let each guest place a burger on a tortilla, top with salsa and guacamole, roll up, and enjoy.
